title: Hello World
content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start Create a new post 1234567891011121314151617181920212223$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"$ hexo new "My New Post"hh1 More info: Writing Run server 1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files 1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites 1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment $$a^2$$ $$ w(\mathbf{x})=w_c(\mathbf{x})+w_0 \cdot \exp \left(-\frac{\left(d_1(\mathbf{x})+d_2(\mathbf{x})\right)^2}{2 \sigma^2}\right) $$ $$J=\left(\begin{array}{ccc} \frac{\partial y_1}{\partial x_1} & \cdots & \frac{\partial y_1}{\partial x_n} \ \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \ \frac{\partial y_m}{\partial x_1} & \cdots & \frac{\partial y_m}{\partial x_n} \end{array}\right)$$
